title: 15 Wicked Wings $10 via App @ KFC (Pickup Only)
body:
Deal: 15 Wicked Wings $10 via App @ KFC (Pickup Only)

[ab c] Spoke too soon, lol, https://www.ozbargain.com.au/comment/17706344/redir
[tonyjzx] pretty much KFC said "go ruin your toilet son"
[Mild October] Maybe they saw your comment and decided to post it immediately
[The Value] Too cheap! I'll be losing money if I don't get this!
[Mjk698] A day has 24 hours. Tomorrow begins 12.01am how is that a hard concept
[AustriaBargain] It says "later today" and it ends at 10pm so we have 23 minutes to claim it?
[brandogs] OzB runs off Sydney local time, so deals will also follow this time zone, if you are in SA, NT or WA it will say "Later Today". Everywhere else it will say "Tomorrow" due to the deal set to start at midnight AEST.
[Bargainboss99] Oh come on .. this cannot be real chicken.
[Fuzor] Because of the price? or because of what?
[tonyjzx] the pieces are REALLY small
you're getting your fill in batter
[KSMLJ] While that is correct about the normal chicken pieces, Wicked Wings are generally the only ones that come in a decent size now.
And it's the only type of chicken I ever order from KFC now.
[kaybrr] I don't get wings tbh, can someone who loves wings explain as they seem to be pretty meat-less.
[AustriaBargain] It's fun picking meat and batter off bones, it's a very primal way to eat.
[furyou] Non kfc wings have meat on them. Kfc ones last i tried were tiny and mostly skin
[Mjk698] Try another store mate wicked wings are amazinggggg
[furyou] many times, they seem small, and def worth only the $1-2 they charged…
[tonyjzx] 15 is too much for some of the ozbb shut ins but 15 is ok for maybe two people for lunch
its not enough if you eat it like my partner who peels off all the batter skin and throws it out
[justtoreply] Too much to buy and eat within a designated meal break timeslot? Yeah, probably. Otherwise I don't know what you mean :p
[timhn] Why can't I just rock up at drive thru and buy this instead have to purchase via app?
[BargainHuntress82] Will this be limited to one per account? Asking for a friend (Also me) he he
[tonyjzx] the deal disappears once its being used
BUT i hear they do it on your email so in theory you could register two accounts on one phone??
[BradH13] I don't know how I'll eat 15 wings but I'll make it work for that price. Bwak.
[wifiwooper] Thanks, OP. It seems like it has been a very long time since we last had any deals on original/H&S chicken. It feels like these promos for wicked wings and nuggets have taken over.
[tubeidea] I think there was a deal last week for wicked boneless (hot and spicy)
[AsukaST] Has anyone tried to pick up 2-3 orders from 2-3 different accounts in 1 drive thru?
Do they let you do so?
[narm] Yes, Ive done 2 orders from 2 accounts from 1 drive thru. Just let them know up front that you've got 2 separate orders
[snackerjoe] I always say 'Hi I've got two online orders' and they only ask for the numbers. Simples.
[Spending2Much] @snackerjoe: And two lots of free drink with survey code
[FutureTech] @Spending2Much: how do you get the free drink if you order online?
[CodeXD] @FutureTech: Tell them you have survey code when collecting food.
